languages.text: Глубочайшие знания и блестящий интеллект Эоганна были поставлены на службу Конклава Коронус. Все его познания о ксеносах, накопленные за долгие годы в рядах ксенаритов, были обращены против врагов Человечества, и карательные операции, проводимые под эгидой Ордо Ксенос, приносили Империуму одну блестящую победу за другой.

Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind were put to good use by the Koronus Conclave. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.
languages.original_text: Глубочайшие знания и блестящий интеллект Эоганна были поставлены на службу Конклава Коронус. Все его познания о ксеносах, накопленные за долгие годы в рядах ксенаритов, были обращены против врагов Человечества, и карательные операции, проводимые под эгидой Ордо Ксенос, приносили Империуму одну блестящую победу за другой.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind were put to good use by the Koronus Conclave. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.

Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind were put to good use by the Koronus Conclave. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.

Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind became a sharp blade in the hands of this new servant of the Inquisition. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.

Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind were put to good use by the Koronus Conclave. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.

Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind were put to good use by the Koronus Conclave. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.

languages.text: エオガンの深い知識と鋭い知性は、この新しいインキジシオンのしもべの手で鋭い刃となった。長年に渡り異種族の研究者として培ってきた異種族に関する知識は、今や人類の敵に対して用いられるようになった。異種族の秩序の庇護の下で行われた懲罰的作戦は、帝国に数々の勝利をもたらした。
languages.original_text: Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind became a sharp blade in the hands of this new servant of the Inquisition. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.

traits.locale_text: エオグヌンの深い知識と鋭い知性は、この新しいインキジシオンのしもべの手で鋭い刃となった。長年に渡り異種族の研究者として培ってきた異種族に関する知識は、今や人類の敵に対して用いられるようになった。異種族の秩序の庇護の下で行われた懲罰的作戦は、帝国に数々の勝利をもたらした。

languages.text: 伊奥贡渊博的知识与聪慧的头脑为科罗努斯密会所用。他多年来在异形科技派中积累的异形知识，如今全部用来对付人类之敌。在异形审判庭的庇护下，一场场惩戒行动为帝国赢得了一场又一场辉煌的胜利。
languages.original_text: Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind were put to good use by the Koronus Conclave. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡渊博的知识与聪慧的头脑为科罗努斯密会所用。他多年来在异形科技派中积累的异形知识，如今全部用来对付人类之敌。在异形审判庭的庇护下，一场场惩戒行动为帝国赢得了一场又一场辉煌的胜利。

languages.text: Le Conclave de Koronus mit à profit le vaste savoir et l'esprit brillant d'Eogunn. Toutes ses connaissances au sujet des xénos, accumulées au fil de nombreuses années dans les rangs des xénarites, furent des plus utiles dans la lutte contre les ennemis de l'humanité. Les opérations punitives menées sous l'égide de l'Ordo Xenos offrirent à l'Imperium une série de victoires écrasantes.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind were put to good use by the Koronus Conclave. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.

traits.locale_text: Le Conclave de Koronus mit à profit le vaste savoir et l'esprit brillant d'Eogunn. Toutes ses connaissances au sujet des xénos, accumulées au fil de nombreuses années dans les rangs des xénarites, furent des plus utiles dans la lutte contre les ennemis de l'humanité. Les opérations punitives menées sous l'égide de l'Ordo Xenos offrirent à l'Imperium une série de victoires écrasantes.

languages.text: El profundo saber y la mente brillante de Eogunn se recibieron un buen uso en el Cónclave de Koronus. Todos sus conocimientos sobre xenos, acumulados durante años en las filas de los xenaritas, ahora se utilizaban contra los enemigos de la Humanidad. Las operaciones de castigo dirigidas por el Ordo Xenos no dejaron de producir victorias para el Imperium.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind were put to good use by the Koronus Conclave. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.

traits.locale_text: El profundo saber y la mente brillante de Eogunn se recibieron un buen uso en el Cónclave de Koronus. Todos sus conocimientos sobre xenos, acumulados durante años en las filas de los xenaritas, ahora se utilizaban contra los enemigos de la Humanidad. Las operaciones de castigo dirigidas por el Ordo Xenos no dejaron de producir victorias para el Imperium.

languages.text: Koronus Meclisi, Eogunn'un derin irfanından ve parlak zihninden faydalanmasını bildi. Zenaritlerin saflarında uzun yıllar boyunca edindiği zenolara dair bilgi birikimi artık İnsanlığın düşmanlarına karşı kullanılıyordu. Zeno Nizamı'nın himayesinde yürütülen cezalandırma operasyonları, İmparatorluk'a birbiri ardına olağanüstü zaferler kazandırdı.
languages.original_text: Eogunn's deep knowledge and brilliant mind were put to good use by the Koronus Conclave. All his knowledge of xenos, accumulated over many years in the ranks of the xenarites, was now turned against the enemies of Humanity. The punitive operations conducted under the aegis of the Ordo Xenos gave the Imperium one outstanding victory after another.

traits.locale_text: Koronus Meclisi, Eogunn'un derin irfanından ve parlak zihninden faydalanmasını bildi. Zenaritlerin saflarında uzun yıllar boyunca edindiği zenolara dair bilgi birikimi artık İnsanlığın düşmanlarına karşı kullanılıyordu. Zeno Nizamı'nın himayesinde yürütülen cezalandırma operasyonları, İmparatorluk'a birbiri ardına olağanüstü zaferler kazandırdı.

languages.text: Eogunns umfassendes Wissen und sein brillanter Verstand wurden vom Koronus-Konklave bestens genutzt. Sein über viele Jahre in den Reihen der Xenariten gesammeltes Wissen über Xenos wurde nun gegen die Feinde der Menschheit eingesetzt. Die Strafoperationen unter dem Befehl des Ordo Xenos bescherten dem Imperium einen herausragenden Sieg nach dem anderen.
